task_name: HDFS DataNode Log - Connection Pattern Analysis
notes: Excellent execution. Agent parsed 2000 log lines accurately, identified 202 unique IPs, correctly grouped by /16 subnets (10.250.x.x: 38 nodes, 10.251.x.x: 164 nodes), ranked top 10 active nodes, analyzed communication patterns (62.2% intra-rack, 37.8% inter-rack), distinguished DataNode (1592 lines, 79.6%) vs FSNamesystem (408 lines, 20.4%) activity with detailed sub-component breakdowns, and estimated cluster size appropriately. Report is well-structured markdown with clear sections, comprehensive IP roster table, traffic characterization, and proper methodology explanation. All requirements met with professional quality output.
